description: Set the default slot(s) of the CMAT. Attempts to assign the following information to the default slot(s) of the CMAT. If the optional keyword 'type' is issued, then it must be followed by a valid contact type name, and the corresponding default slot of the CMAT will be modified. If no type is specified, then the command will attempt to modify all the default slots. By default, only mechanical contacts are considered.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: itasca.command('contact cmat default ...') - Python SDK does not provide direct CMAT API, must use command interface

model_properties_reference.description: For detailed property information for each contact model, see the model-properties reference documentation

notes: If 'type' keyword is NOT specified, ALL default slots are modified
If 'type' keyword IS specified, only that contact type's default slot is modified
Default slots are used when no specific CMAT entry matches a newly created contact
The default slot(s) will not be modified if the contact type(s) cannot use the specified model
Multiple properties can be set in a single command
The 'method' keyword registers methods that execute automatically at contact creation
Common method 'deformability' calculates stiffnesses from elastic modulus and stiffness ratio
Use 'mechanical' (default) or 'thermal' to specify contact type

common_use_cases.use_case: Set global default for all contact types
common_use_cases.command: contact cmat default model linear property kn 1e8 ks 5e7 fric 0.5

common_use_cases.use_case: Set different defaults per contact type
common_use_cases.command:
contact cmat default type ball-ball model hertz property hz_shear 2e9
contact cmat default type ball-facet model linear property kn 1e8

common_use_cases.use_case: Use deformability method for automatic stiffness calculation
common_use_cases.command: contact cmat default model linear method deformability emod 5e9 kratio 1.5

common_use_cases.use_case: Set bonded material default with parallel bonds
common_use_cases.command: contact cmat default model linearpbond property pb_kn 1e9 pb_ks 5e8 pb_ten 1e6 pb_coh 5e5

typical_workflow: 1. Define default contact behavior for all types: contact cmat default model linear ...
2. Or set per-type defaults: contact cmat default type ball-ball model ...
3. Add specific CMAT entries for special cases: contact cmat add ...
4. Create contacts - they automatically get assigned according to CMAT rules
5. If needed, apply CMAT to existing contacts: contact cmat apply

important_distinctions.default_vs_add: The 'default' command sets the fallback behavior when no specific CMAT entry matches. The 'add' command creates specific rules that are checked first.
important_distinctions.with_type_vs_without_type: Without 'type' keyword, ALL default slots are modified. With 'type', only that specific contact type is affected.
important_distinctions.method_vs_property: Methods are procedures that can calculate multiple properties (e.g., 'deformability' calculates kn/ks from emod/kratio). Properties are direct value assignments.

keywords.name: inheritance
keywords.description: The inheritance flag for the contact model property is set to b . The property must support inheritance.

keywords.name: mechanical
keywords.description: Apply to mechanical contacts.

keywords.name: method
keywords.description: The contact model method sm , along with its specific list of pairs of argument names and values ( sa , a ) (if applicable), is registered with the selected default slot(s) and will be invoked at contact creation.

keywords.name: softbond
keywords.description: Specify the default model. The default slot(s) will not be modified if the corresponding contact type(s) cannot use the specified contact model. The list of built-in mechanical contact models is given in the “ Built-in Contact Models ” section. Users may also implement custom contact models (see “ User-Defined Contact Models ” for further information) and register them in the CMAT. Specify the Adhesive Rolling Resistance Linear Model contact model. Specify the Bilinear Contact Model contact model. Specify the Burger’s Model contact model. Specify the FISH Model contact model. Specify the Flat-Joint Model contact model. Specify the Hertz Model contact model. Specify the Hysteretic Model contact model. Specify the Linear Model contact model. Specify the Linear Contact Bond Model contact model. Specify the Linear Dipole Model contact model. Specify the Linear Parallel Bond Model contact model. Specify the Null Model contact model. Specify the Rolling Resistance Linear Model contact model. Specify the Smooth-Joint Model contact model. Specify the Soft-Bond Model contact model.

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: Specify the contact model property. If the optional inheritance is issued, then the property must support inheritance and a boolean must follow indicating its inheritance flag.

keywords.name: proximity
keywords.description: The detection distance is set to fd .

keywords.name: thermal
keywords.description: Apply to thermal contacts.

keywords.name: rblock-rblock
keywords.description: Specify that this CMAT entry applies to contacts of the specified type. This can also be accomplished with the contact range element. Specify that this is the ball-ball default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the ball-facet default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the ball-pebble default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the ball-rblock default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the pebble-facet default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the pebble-pebble default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the pebble-rblock default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the rblock-facet default CMAT entry. Specify that this is the rblock-rblock default CMAT entry.

examples.command: contact cmat default model linear property kn 1e8 ks 5e7 fric 0.5
examples.description: Set default entry to linear model with specified stiffness and friction

examples.command: contact cmat default model linear prop dp_nratio 0.8 dp_mode 1
examples.description: Set default entry to linear model with damping properties (from BlenderBalls.dat)

examples.command: contact cmat default model rrlinear method deformability emod 5e9 kratio 1.5 property fric 0.5 dp_nratio 0.7 dp_sratio 0.7 dp_mode 1 rr_fric 0.3
examples.description: Set default to rrlinear model with deformability method and rolling resistance (from Rolling Resistance example)

examples.command: contact cmat default model linearpbond method deformability emod 1e10 kratio 1.0
examples.description: Set default to linearpbond model with deformability method (from PunchIndentation.dat)

examples.command: contact cmat default type ball-ball model hertz property hz_shear 2e9 hz_poiss 0.25 fric 0.3
examples.description: Set ball-ball default to Hertz model with specific properties

examples.command: contact cmat default type ball-facet model linear property kn 1e8 ks 5e7
examples.description: Set ball-facet default separately with linear model

examples.command: contact cmat default mechanical model linear property kn 1e8
examples.description: Set mechanical contact default (all types) to linear model

examples.command: contact cmat default thermal property th_kn 100
examples.description: Set thermal contact default properties

keywords.name: inheritance
keywords.description: The inheritance flag for the contact model property sprop is set to b . The property sprop must support inheritance.

keywords.name: method
keywords.description: The contact model method sm , along with its specific list of pairs of argument names and values ( sa , a ) (if applicable), is registered with the selected default slot(s) and will be invoked at contact creation. The list of available methods is contact model specific. Visit the documentation of the desired contact model for details.

keywords.name: softbond
keywords.description: Specify the default model. The default slot(s) will not be modified if the corresponding contact type(s) cannot use the specified contact model. The list of built-in mechanical contact models is given in the “ Built-in Contact Models ” section. Users may also implement custom contact models (see “ User-Defined Contact Models ” for further information) and register them in the CMAT.
